overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking along a rural dirt path toward a large wooden windmill, stopping to examine it, then running through tall golden grass fields toward a distant forest. The scene features bright summer lighting, open countryside, and no other characters or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through green fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the wooden windmill in the distance

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with four sails standing on a small hill
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
lush green grass covering the rolling hills on both sides of the path
dense line of trees forming the horizon boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open green fields under a bright blue sky. A large wooden windmill stands prominently in the distance ahead, with a forest tree line visible on the horizon. The environment is peaceful and empty of other people or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of the wooden windmill structure

events.description: character stops walking upon reaching the windmill base
camera tilts upward to look up at the windmill sails against the sky
character turns around 180 degrees to face back toward the path

agents.ego_description: approaches the windmill, stops to look up at the tall structure and its rotating sails, then turns around to leave

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts near the windmill base

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the base of the large wooden windmill, which now dominates the frame. The camera looks up at the structure against a partly cloudy sky. After a moment of observation, the character turns around to leave. A simple wooden fence is visible near the windmill base.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with tall golden wheat

events.description: character transitions from walking to running speed
ground cover changes from short green grass to tall golden grass field

agents.ego_description: running through tall golden grass away from the windmill toward the distant tree line and village

entered.detail: field of tall golden wheat-like grass reaching waist height
small settlement with wooden buildings visible among the distant trees

segments.scene_description: The character runs away from the windmill through an expansive field of tall golden grass. The terrain is open with scattered bushes, and a distant village becomes visible among the trees on the horizon. The windmill and fence are left behind as the character moves deeper into the countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a peaceful rural path toward a towering wooden windmill and then across an expansive golden grassland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through open green fields under a bright blue sky, moving steadily toward a distant windmill and a far-off tree line. As the character arrives, the camera tilts upward to let the massive wooden structure dominate the frame against a partly cloudy sky, lingering briefly by a simple wooden fence. The scene then shifts as the character turns and begins to run, leaving the windmill behind to plunge into a vast field of tall golden grass. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the open countryside, passing scattered bushes as a distant village emerges among the trees on the horizon.
